scoring.name: BMScore
scoring.description: Experimental score for BM Canvas assessment

canvas.title: Problem
canvas.subtitle: Why?
canvas.description: What is the problem addressed? Why is this important for customers? Do we align with the purpose?

canvas.title: Key Activities
canvas.subtitle: What?
canvas.description: What is the solution? Is it new and can it move the needle? Why is now good timing?

canvas.title: Key Resources
canvas.subtitle: How much proven?
canvas.description: Implementation status? What validation of Product Market Fit exists? Ability to execute?

canvas.title: Value Propositions
canvas.subtitle: Why buy? Unique?
canvas.description: What are the main benefits for customers? USPs and differentiators? Optional: High-level concept: 'The A for B.'

canvas.title: Customer Relationships
canvas.subtitle: How sold?
canvas.description: How are customers reached and retained? Partners and multipliers? Network effects?

canvas.title: Channels
canvas.subtitle: How much sold?
canvas.description: Sales pipeline and conversion? Reasons for customers to (not) buy? Current and target unit economics?

canvas.title: Customer Segments
canvas.subtitle: For whom?
canvas.description: Target customer segments and user/buyer personas? How well do we know their needs?

canvas.title: Cost Structure
canvas.subtitle: Who?
canvas.description: Skills and proven experience in the founder team? Ability to pivot if needed? Openness to coaching?

canvas.title: Revenue Streams
canvas.subtitle: How big?
canvas.description: What is the defiition, size and growth of the market (TAM, SAM, SOM)?

canvas.subtitle: What if not?
canvas.description: Optional: How is the problem addressed today?

canvas.subtitle: How to stay ahead?
canvas.description: Optional: Is there a moat and how can market advantage be defended? What unfair advantage exists?

canvas.subtitle: Who supports?
canvas.description: Optional: Who co-invests, advises, offers access?
